subject: weather alert for LSJ
body:
Jeffrey,
It appears that a tropical depression is heading in  the direction of LSJ. It 
has the potential to become a hurricane, it will be  there by Tuesday morning 
at present speed. I will monitor its progress. 
 
N491GM
Bell 407: Paul Schrader at Bell Helicopter has  informed me that our tail 
rotor blade that was repaired  by Bell Factory  during our last annual inspection 
may have been repaired improperly. There has  been 3 blade failures in the 
past 2 months and was determined that one mechanic  employed by Bell was not 
doing proper installation of bolts with lock tight  sealant causing blades to 
come apart. We have grounded our Bell 407 at this time  and a  Bell mechanic and 
blade will arrive Saturday on St. Thomas to  replace our blade at Bell's 
expense.
Paul and Bell Helicopter are embarrassed and  apologize. 
LV



************************************** See what's new at http://www.aol.com
body_html:
Jeffrey,
It appears that a tropical depression is heading in the direction of LSJ. It has the potential to become a hurricane, it will be there by Tuesday morning at present speed. I will monitor its progress.
 
N491GM
Bell 407: Paul Schrader at Bell Helicopter has informed me that our tail rotor blade that was repaired  by Bell Factory during our last annual inspection may have been repaired improperly. There has been 3 blade failures in the past 2 months and was determined that one mechanic employed by Bell was not doing proper installation of bolts with lock tight sealant causing blades to come apart. We have grounded our Bell 407 at this time and a  Bell mechanic and blade will arrive Saturday on St. Thomas to replace our blade at Bell's expense.
Paul and Bell Helicopter are embarrassed and apologize.
LV
